query: SELECT external_id, contract_external_id, contract_no, customer_name, updated_by, updated_at, paid_at, amount FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT external_id, contract_external_id, contract_no, customer_name, updated_by, updated_at, paid_at, amount FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL LIMIT 3;
